caption: A man with glasses and a large, stylized grey wig sits in a studio setting, facing left. He wears a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders, with black headphones over his ears. He remains relatively still, with a slight change in his facial expression across the sequence. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall adorned with various framed photos and clothing items on hangers. An on-screen logo appears in the lower-left of each frame, featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". To the right of the man, additional text reads "BOSS TALK JOY". The scene remains consistent throughout the frames, with only subtle movements of the man's head and mouth as he looks toward someone or something off-camera.
